mentions.note: DIY-weighted (better than Home Depot): tepid SSS but 10% total revenue growth, 4% earnings growth. Outperforming due to consumer mix; interest-rate dependent like Home Depot.
DIY-focused retailer vs. HD's pro focus; dearth of new home sales favors DIY renovations; outperform vs. Home Depot comparisons.
Down 1.5%; home improvement and repair demand cooling; signals slowdown in residential construction and home spending.
Down; home improvement sector lacking broad strength.
Hit 52-week high; CEO Marvin Ellison achieving gains in god-awful environment; housing recovery driving home improvement demand.
